app.title: Instagram Unfollow Radar
app.subtitle: Automatically find and unfollow non-followers on Instagram

status.error: Scan failed — please reload Instagram and try again

alerts.batchCompleteDesc: 50 users unfollowed. Do you want to continue?
alerts.rateLimitDesc: Instagram has rate-limited you. Please wait.
alerts.dailyLimitDesc: You have reached your daily unfollow limit. Please wait 24 hours for a new session.

filters.keywordsDesc: Users whose name or username contains these keywords will be skipped
filters.whitelistDesc: These users will never be unfollowed

watch.title: Watch list
watch.disclaimer: Add an account to see when they follow someone new. Private accounts usually won’t show a list. Follow Instagram’s rules.
watch.partialNote: Tap Refresh to update. New follows show up after that person’s following count on their profile goes up. If they follow many people, you may need to refresh a few times to load the full list.
watch.slotLimitHint: Free plan: up to {freeMax} account. Premium: up to {premiumMax}.
watch.newLast24: New in the 24 hours after you added them: {count}
watch.noNewFollows: No new follows in this 24-hour period
watch.addedOk: Added. Tap Refresh to see updates.
watch.errorNoInstagramTab: Open Instagram in your browser first, then try again.
watch.errorContentScript: Couldn’t finish that. Refresh Instagram and try again.

error.max_entries: Watch list is full. Free: up to {freeMax} account(s). Premium: up to {premiumMax}.
error.duplicate: This user is already on the list
error.not_found: User not found or profile unavailable
error.profile_failed: Could not load profile (account may be private)
error.not_in_list: User is not on the list
error.rate_limit: Too many requests right now — wait a bit and try again
error.unknownAction: Extension was updated — refresh your Instagram tab and try again.
error.network: Connection problem. Refresh Instagram and try again.

warning.title: Good to know
warning.item1: You need to be signed in to Instagram
warning.item2: There is a short wait between each action
warning.item3: After 50 unfollows, you’ll be asked if you want to continue
warning.item4: Daily limit: 10 on Free, 500 on Premium
warning.item5: The daily limit resets every 24 hours

messages.confirmReset: All statistics will be reset. Are you sure?
messages.confirmReload: Extension not loaded yet. Would you like to reload the page?
messages.undoFailedDetail: Undo failed. Make sure you are logged in at instagram.com.
messages.startFailed: Failed to start — reload the page

auth.confirmSignOut: Are you sure you want to sign out? Your Premium access will be paused.
auth.error: Google sign-in failed. Please try again.

premium.exportLockHint: 🔒 CSV export is a Premium feature — Upgrade to unlock
premium.notSignedIn: Sign in with Google to access Premium features.
premium.upgradeHint: Secure payment via Paddle — active instantly

aria.chartDescription: Chart showing the number of users unfollowed in the last 30 days
